id: transactions-on-contract

sidebar_label: "Transactions on contract"

hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Transactions on contract"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/my/contracts/{contractNumber}/transactions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of transactions on contract

| Feature                              | Supported by resource |
| ---                                  | ---                   |
| [paging](#introduction/paging)       | Yes                   |
| [sorting](#introduction/sorting)     | No                    |
| [filtering](#introduction/filtering) | Yes                   |

#### Paging

This resource supports [paging](#introduction/paging). The attribute `id` will be used as the value for `before` or `after` parameter.

*Example request:*

`GET /my/contracts/{contractNumber}/transactions?limit=10&after=60`

*Example response pagingInfo:*

```
"pagingInfo": {
    "nextPage": "/banking/v1/my/contracts/123456789/transactions?limit=10&after=70",
    "prevPage": "/banking/v1/my/contracts/123456789/transactions?limit=10&before=60",
    "itemsPerPage": 10
}
```

#### Sorting

Transactions are sorted by default according to `bookingDate`. Custom sorting is not supported.

#### Filtering

This resource supports [filtering](#introduction/filtering). You can use following filters:

filter name      | possible operators | example
---              | ---                | ---
bookingDate      | lt,lteq,gt,gteq,eq | `transactions?filter=bookingDate|gt|2015-01-10;bookingDate|lteq|2015-01-20`  transactions with 2015-01-10 &lt; bookingDate &lt; 2015-01-20
amount.value     | lteq,gteq,eq       | `transactions?filter=amount.value|gteq|100;amount.value|lteq|1000`  transactions with 100 &lt; amount.value &lt; 1000, in account's currency

Possible error codes explanation:
| Error status code | Code         | Explanation                 |
| --- | ---                        | ---                         |
| 404 | RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND         | Resource could not be found |
| 500 | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR      | Internal failure            |

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"contractNumber","in":"path","description":"ID of contract","required":true,"example":"3700227718","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"include","in":"query","description":"Specification of trasactions to include. Possible values: `HOLD` (only authorization holds, e.g. non-processed transactions), `PROCESSED` (only processed transactions), `BOTH` (include both processed transactions and authorization holds)","required":false,"example":"HOLD","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"List of contract related transactions","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["id","contractNumber","amount","direction","status","valueDate"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"T12312345","description":"internal transaction identifier"},"contractNumber":{"type":"string","example":"123456789","description":"contract to that transaction belongs (to which it is accounted)"},"amount":{"type":"object","required":["value","currency"],"properties":{"value":{"type":"number","example":125.9,"description":"Amount in major currency unit (two digits used after decimal separator which is '.')"},"currency":{"type":"string","example":"CZK","description":"Amount currency. [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"}},"title":"Amount"},"direction":{"type":"string","enum":["CREDIT","DEBIT"],"description":"direction of transaction"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["UNPROCESSED","PROCESSED"],"description":"transaction status"},"partyAccount":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["IBAN","NATIONAL"],"description":"Account type"}},"title":"BankAccount"},"partyDescription":{"type":"string","example":"John Doe","description":"party description"},"valueDate":{"type":"string","example":"2016-02-10T10:00Z","description":"transaction value date, e.g. the day transaction \"happened\""},"bookingDate":{"type":"string","example":"2016-02-09T10:00Z","description":"transaction booking date, e.g. the day transaction was bookkeeped"},"payerMessage":{"type":"string","example":"need to pay this","description":"message for payer. Empty for incoming transactions."},"payeeMessage":{"type":"string","example":"info","description":"message for payee (e.g. for client receiving transaction)"},"transactionFeeCanceled":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true if transaction fee is canceled."},"additionalInfoDomestic":{"type":"object","properties":{"constantSymbol":{"type":"string","example":"0558"},"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","example":"9"},"specificSymbol":{"type":"string","example":"100011"}},"title":"TransactionInfoDomestic"},"additionalInfoForeign":{"type":"object","properties":{"originalValue":{"type":"object","required":["value","currency"],"properties":{"value":{"type":"number","example":125.9,"description":"Amount in major currency unit (two digits used after decimal separator which is '.')"},"currency":{"type":"string","example":"CZK","description":"Amount currency. [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"}},"title":"Amount"},"exchangeRate":{"type":"number","example":12.8,"description":"exchange rate valid at the time of transfer"}},"title":"TransactionInfoForeign"},"additionalInfoCard":{"type":"object","required":["cardNumber"],"properties":{"mcc":{"type":"string","example":"3081","description":"Merchant Category code"},"merchantName":{"type":"string","example":"SomeCompany, Ltd."},"cardNumber":{"type":"string","example":"34xx-xxxx-xxxx-6289","description":"Masked card number used for transaction"},"cardName":{"type":"string","example":"Šikovná karta Home Credit","description":"Card name"}},"title":"TransactionInfoCard"}},"title":"Transaction"}},"pagingInfo":{"type":"object","required":["itemsPerPage"],"properties":{"itemsPerPage":{"type":"number","example":10,"description":"Number of items per page"},"nextPage":{"type":"string","example":"banking/v1/my/contracts/123456789/transactions?limit=10&after=30","description":"Request to retrieve next page, if it exists and can be unambiguously specified"},"prevPage":{"type":"string","example":"banking/v1/my/contracts/123456789/transactions?limit=10&before=20","description":"Request to retrieve previous page, if it exists and can be unambiguously specified"}},"title":"PagingInfo"}}},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"data":[{"id":"T12312345","contractNumber":"123456789","amount":{"value":125.9,"currency":"CZK"},"direction":"CREDIT","status":"PROCESSED","partyAccount":{"type":"IBAN","iban":{"iban":"CZ6508000000192000145399"}},"partyDescription":"John Doe","valueDate":"2016-02-10T10:00Z","bookingDate":"2016-02-09T10:00Z","payerMessage":"need to pay this","payeeMessage":"info","transactionFeeCanceled":false,"additionalInfoDomestic":{"constantSymbol":"0558","variableSymbol":"9","specificSymbol":"100011"},"additionalInfoForeign":{"originalValue":{"value":125.9,"currency":"CZK"},"exchangeRate":12.8},"additionalInfoCard":{"mcc":"3081","merchantName":"SomeCompany, Ltd.","cardNumber":"34xx-xxxx-xxxx-6289","cardName":"Šikovná karta Home Credit"}}],"pagingInfo":{"itemsPerPage":10,"nextPage":"banking/v1/my/contracts/123456789/transactions?limit=10&after=30","prevPage":"banking/v1/my/contracts/123456789/transactions?limit=10&before=20"}}}}}}},"204":{"description":"No Content","headers":{}},"404":{"description":"Not (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","example":"personalBirthNumber","description":"json path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","example":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4","description":"internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"title":"Error"}}},"title":"Errors"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"ERR_1000_SOME_ERROR_CODE","message":"Some error/validation message description","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"personalBirthNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
